title: NumberConditionReportingConfig
description: NumberConditionReportingConfig: Config object containing settings for reporting results of checks against numerical value conditions.

UnitLabel.description: Text to be used as a label for units expressing the extracted value.

ValueMultiplier.description: Multiplier to be applied to the extracted value prior to reporting.

RoundingAccuracy.description: Rounding accuracy to be used when reporting the extracted value.

ValueSourceLabelOverride.description: Override text to be used as a label for value source.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
